blueprint:
{"name": "ESG Validation Pipeline v5 (Lean -- Claims-Direct)", "flow": [{"id": 1, "module": "gateway:CustomWebHook", "version": 1, "parameters": {"hook": 3338114, "maxResults": 1}, "mapper": {}, "metadata": {"designer": {"x": 0, "y": 0}, "restore": {"parameters": {"hook": {"data": {"editable": true, "name": "VeriGreen_ESG_Upload_Webhook"}}}}}}, {"id": 2, "module": "builtin:BasicFeeder", "version": 1, "parameters": {}, "mapper": {"array": "{{1.claims}}"}, "metadata": {"designer": {"x": 300, "y": 0}}}, {"id": 3, "module": "gemini-ai:extractStructuredData", "version": 1, "parameters": {"__IMTCONN__": 8749989}, "mapper": {"model": "gemini-2.5-flash", "contents": [{"role": "user", "parts": [{"type": "text", "text": "You are an ESG audit specialist. Score the following ESG claim on 5 substantiation indicators. Each indicator is scored 1 (pass) or 0 (fail).

Claim: {{2.raw_text}}

Indicators:
1. vague_language: 1 if specific language (NOT vague like committed to, working towards, aims to), 0 if vague.
2. quantification: 1 if the claim includes a specific number or percentage, 0 if not.
3. baseline: 1 if references a baseline year or comparison point, 0 if not.
4. time_bound: 1 if specifies a target year or deadline, 0 if not.
5. third_party_verification: 1 if mentions third-party verification or certification, 0 if not.

substantiation_score = sum of all 5 indicators (0-5).

Return ONLY a valid JSON object with exactly these 6 integer fields."}]}], "responseSchema": [{"key": "vague_language", "label": "Vague Language (0/1)", "type": "integer"}, {"key": "quantification", "label": "Quantification (0/1)", "type": "integer"}, {"key": "baseline", "label": "Baseline (0/1)", "type": "integer"}, {"key": "time_bound", "label": "Time Bound (0/1)", "type": "integer"}, {"key": "third_party_verification", "label": "Third Party Verification (0/1)", "type": "integer"}, {"key": "substantiation_score", "label": "Total Score (0-5)", "type": "integer"}], "generationConfig": {"thinkingConfig": {}}}, "metadata": {"designer": {"x": 600, "y": 0}}}, {"id": 4, "module": "mistral-ai:createEmbeddings", "version": 1, "parameters": {"__IMTCONN__": 8749892}, "mapper": {"model": "mistral-embed", "input": ["{{2.raw_text}}"], "encoding_format": "float"}, "metadata": {"designer": {"x": 900, "y": 0}}}, {"id": 5, "module": "qdrant:uploadPoint", "version": 1, "parameters": {"__IMTCONN__": 8774749}, "mapper": {"collectionName": "esg_claims", "id": "{{2.id_int}}", "idType": "integer", "vector": "{{4.data[].embedding}}", "payloadType": "json", "payloadJson": "{"claim_id":"{{2.claim_id}}","job_id":"{{1.job_id}}","company_name":"{{1.company_name}}","raw_text":"{{2.raw_text}}","category":"{{2.category}}","unit":"{{2.unit}}","numeric_value":"{{2.numeric_value}}","reporting_year":"{{2.reporting_year}}","vague_language":{{ifempty(3.result.vague_language, 0)}},"quantification":{{ifempty(3.result.quantification, 0)}},"baseline":{{ifempty(3.result.baseline, 0)}},"time_bound":{{ifempty(3.result.time_bound, 0)}},"third_party_verification":{{ifempty(3.result.third_party_verification, 0)}},"substantiation_score":{{ifempty(3.result.substantiation_score, 0)}},"status":"pending_review","pipeline_version":"v5"}"}, "metadata": {"designer": {"x": 1200, "y": 0}}}], "metadata": {"instant": true, "version": 1, "scenario": {"roundtrips": 1, "maxErrors": 3, "autoCommit": true, "autoCommitTriggerLast": true, "sequential": false, "confidential": false, "dataloss": false, "dlq": false, "freshVariables": false}, "designer": {"orphans": []}, "zone": "eu1.make.com"}}
